reasoning: This animation sequence will depict a robot gently cradling a sapling, representing the care and nurturing associated with trees.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, focusing on the gentle upward lift of the arms and the slight inward turn to protect the imaginary sapling.  I will use a three-frame sequence to highlight the key moments of this action. Frame 1 shows the arms starting in a neutral position, Frame 2 shows the arms lifting and slightly turning inward, and Frame 3 shows the arms holding the imaginary sapling.  The use of the wrist will be minimal, keeping it mostly neutral to avoid distracting from the overall gesture.  This sequence aims to evoke a feeling of peaceful interaction with nature.
